# YOUR CODE HERE
n, k = map(int, input().split())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))

empty_seats = k
start_count = 0

for group in a:
    if empty_seats < group:
        start_count += 1
        empty_seats = k
    empty_seats -= group

# After processing all groups, check if the attraction needs to be started one last time
if empty_seats < k:
    start_count += 1

print(start_count)
